title: Visions of AI: Rebuilding Modern Education
description: Kanha delivered the keynote opening presentation discussing how AI development environments are democratizing student access, urging schools to shift from rote syntax to design thinking.

title: Systems Architecture: Scalability Masterclass
description: A 4-hour live coding demonstration building a global event-driven messaging service from scratch. Kanha detailed load balancers, caching, and low-latency database setups.

title: TEDxTalk: The Power of building in Public
description: A speech on how public documentation of one's learning journey can attract global career networks, replace outdated resumes, and build organic personal brands.
